MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Carter Zinn, Esq., 415-292-4100 for petitioner and moving party Vesta Kirby.
Kathleen Morris, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-3987 for respondent and opposing party City and County of San Francisco.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling:
PLAINTIFF VESTA KIRBY'S Hearing Re Petition For Relief From Gov. 945.4 IS GRANTED. EQUITABLE ESTOPPEL APPLIES. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR #1558. (301/JLW/EH)
